title: Vegapunk’s Future Island
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Vegapunk, Unknown person #2, Kid, Unknown person #3, Robin as Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.
scene: Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What are you talking about?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: that once in the past...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This futuristic city existed?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's just a theory...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In the world of archeologists, there was once a man who risked his life to find out about that kingdom...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then he found a "machine" in a certain place.. that had a manufacture date which matched the theory he had in mind.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Was that machine produced...

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: During the "Void century"?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How much do you know about that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Robin, did you know something about that?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All I remember about it is that it was a painful story.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 22 years ago, your birthplace ohara was destroyed with a buster call from the navy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think the reason it got destroyed was because ohara knew about the existence of that "Kingdom".

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: During the "Void century"... there once was a highly advanced civilization that existed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The history about the battle was between "A certain kingdom" and "20 kingdoms"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The winners were the "20 Kingdoms", they founded the "World Government" that the world knows today.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To make sure that nobody carried "that kingdom's" ideology,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They erased its existence from history.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Eh!? What's with that story!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Huh?! is that story true!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Wow! What a massive romance story!!

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: Wait a minute, vegapunk!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then those people who knew about it... they..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yes, they've been obligated.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then why are you talking about it so easily!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ah!!! I didn't hear anything about it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aaah! Forget about it! I haven't known or heard anything either!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I said it's only a theory, however...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Nico Robin,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If "ohara" was erased because of this theory, that means...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Anyone knows

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The government had...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: acknowled that the theory is "The Truth", right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who do you think you are? Talking about us like that!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The researchers in Ohara made a theory from researching various important documents.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you think the government will hear it from a powerful person like you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, I'm similar to you too. Even if I work with the government...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I talk about it, I'll be obligated.

summary: This part advances the Egghead / Vegapunk Truth through 38 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
